hero.name: IndOz Conference
hero.eyebrow: Brisbane · annual since 2012 · Synergy Indonesia Australia · next edition 2 September 2026
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 25%, hsl(15 65% 55% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(45 35% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(20 55% 60%) 0%, hsl(40 35% 38%) 50%, hsl(45 30% 18%) 100%)
hero.welcome_md:
The annual Indonesia–Australia bilateral business conference held in Brisbane, founded by **Synergy Indonesia Australia** in 2012 as an Indonesian cultural celebration and grown into the largest Indonesia-Australia bilateral business event in Brisbane — 611 attendees in 2025 (the largest in the event's thirteen-year history), held at Brisbane City Hall under the theme *Indonesia-Australia: A Thriving and Enduring Partnership*.

*The Bali node of this bridge is [Ilena Young](/people/ilena-young) 's SaBali (Synergy Australia Bali); it's how her Ranakami work and her Australian regional-development arc are part of one continuous bilateral practice.*

facts.label: Where
facts.value_md: Brisbane City Hall, Brisbane, Queensland, Australia. Annual.

facts.label: Founded
facts.value_md: 2012 by Synergy Indonesia Australia, originally as an Indonesian cultural celebration.

facts.label: Scale
facts.value_md: 2025 edition: 611 attendees across conference + business dinner — the largest in the event's 13-year history. Theme: *Indonesia-Australia: A Thriving and Enduring Partnership*.

facts.label: Bali node
facts.value_md: [Ilena Young](/people/ilena-young) carries SaBali (Synergy Australia Bali) as the Bali node of the Synergy Indonesia Australia bridge.

articles.body_md: The Coherence Network reads bridges-between-two-places as load-bearing substrate teaching. Ilena Young's professional arc is itself one — Australian regional-development knowledge brought into bilateral relation with Indonesia, and Indonesian wellness practice held inside an Australian-credentialled professional framework. The conference is the legible public form of that bridge; the Ranakami sanctuary in Sayan is the felt-private form. Both are the same practice in different registers.
articles.heading: The bilateral bridge shape

articles.body_md:
- The legible-public surface of [Ilena Young](/people/ilena-young) 's bilateral practice — a documented annual event makes the bridge shape verifiable rather than anecdotal.
- Indonesia ↔ Australia as substrate-pair → pairs with the body's practice of holding plural cultural lineages without collapsing one into the other. Resonant with [lc-voice-over-intentions](/vision/lc-voice-over-intentions) (each cultural voice present in its own register).
- Thirteen-year continuity (2012 → 2026) → resonant with [lc-tending-over-producing](/vision/lc-tending-over-producing) (the slow build of a recurring gathering as substrate of trust).
articles.heading: What IndOz Conference has given the Coherence Network

metadata.title: IndOz Conference — annual Indonesia–Australia bilateral event in Brisbane since 2012 | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to IndOz — the annual Indonesia-Australia bilateral business conference in Brisbane, founded by Synergy Indonesia Australia in 2012. 611 attendees in 2025; next edition 2 September 2026. The bridge Ilena Young's SaBali tends from the Bali side.

note_from_body.body_md: IndOz is a working professional conference with its own sponsorship structure and programme committee. This page recognises its role as the bilateral surface Ilena's SaBali node connects to from Bali.
